---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

<!--
What are you trying to do? What is currently inconvenient, slow, or
impossible? Concrete user stories beat abstract wishes.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
What you'd like to see. CLI surface, .ush syntax, runtime behaviour,
config knob, etc. If you've prototyped it, link the branch.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other shapes you thought about and why you discarded them. -->

## Scope

<!--
Is this part of the shell runtime, the .ush language, the compiler,
the LSP, or the installer/packaging? Knowing the rough boundary helps
triage.
-->
